title: Protocol for Bacterial Heterotrophic Production
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"9cb97","text":"Materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cftfu","text":"- 10 place filter manifold","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2s5e0","text":" - Towers (chilled overnight @ 4C) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cqh4j","text":"- 5% (w/v) Trichloroacetic acid (TCA) (chilled overnight @ 4C) Usually 1L is enough for a single time series set ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5avle","text":"- 32 15ml centrifuge tubes ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"94d0n","text":"- Pump ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7h5q2","text":"- Scintillation vials and fluid (UltimaGold) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8ovlo","text":"- Lab supplies","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"av636","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"37j1e","text":"Map:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"42iev","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"14n1b","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"faacj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"51A82F0C1B824AE3876FE30F1C800673","height":null,"is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":null,"placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/uyc2xe.jpg","source":"https://content.protocols.io/uyc2xe.jpg","width":null}}}}
steps: Label in duplicate, 4 15ml centrifuge tubes for each depth (3 samples and 1 control) One set for Thymidine and another for Leucine.
Rinse each tube 3x with ~5ml of sample seawater
Pour 10ml of sample into rinsed centrifuge tube
Kill control samples by adding 0.1ml of filtered formalin
Let stand 10 minutes 00:10:00
Pipette 5nM of tritiated Thymine or 5nM of tritiated Leucine into sample Typically vol. TdR<vol Leu.
Dispose of tips into labeled plastic whirlpak bags
Incubate samples at seawater temperature for 1 hour 01:00:00
During incubation, label scintillation vials
10 minutes before incubation time ends set-up Hoeffer box with 0.45μm HA Millipore filters
Place chilled towers
Following incubation pour samples into respective wells and filter through (<0.3 atm) Make sure no leaks!!
Turn off pump and close wells
Add ~2ml of 5% TCA to each well
Let stand for 2 minutes 00:02:00
After 2 minutes, open wells and filter through TCA
Rinse towers 3x with 5% TCA
Remove towers (pump is still on!)
Rinse filter 3x with 5% TCA, enough to cover filters completely
Turn off pump
Remove filters and place in labelled scintillation vials
Add 5ml of UltimaGold scintillation fluid
Tightly cap scint vial and shake HARD; make sure the filter ends up in the liquid
Let sit for at least 3 hours before final counts, preferably overnight 03:00:00
Perform wipetest of surrounding area (see map in guidelines)
Read samples in scintillation counter Currently using program #1 (1 minute read).
Rinse towers with diH 2 O
Rinse top of Hoeffer box with diH 2 O
Pour radioactive filtrate out of Hoeffer box into waste container carefully Use a funnel!
Throw dry waste into radioactive waste barrel Not the regular trash!
Record isotope usage online
creator: Jed Fuhrman
